title: dryopteris ludens
intro: Dryopteris ludens is a species of fern belonging to the Dryopteris genus, commonly known as the wood fern. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris ludens include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
